# @zakkster/lite-headless/stat

KPI dashboard card: label + numeric value (with tween animation) +
optional trend indicator (direction + magnitude).

## API

```js
import { createStat } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/stat";

const stat = createStat({
    defaultValue: 1234,
    defaultLabel: "Revenue",
    defaultUnit: "$",
    defaultTrend: { direction: "up", value: 12.5 },
    formatter: (n) => n.toLocaleString(),
    trendFormatter: (t) => `${t.direction === "up" ? "+" : "-"}${t.value}%`,
    animationDuration: 600,    // ms; 0 disables tween
    onValueChange: (next, prev) => {},
});
```

## Reactive accessors

```js
stat.value()         // number (current target)
stat.displayValue()  // number (current frame's tween value)
stat.label()         // string
stat.unit()          // string
stat.trend()         // { direction: "up"|"down"|"flat", value: number } | null
```

## Mutations

```js
stat.setValue(v)               // triggers tween from displayValue to v
stat.setLabel(s)
stat.setUnit(s)
stat.setTrend({direction, value} | null)
```

## Attach

```js
stat.attachRoot(el)     // role=group; paints data-trend-direction + data-has-trend
stat.attachLabel(el)    // textContent = label
stat.attachValue(el)    // textContent = formatter(displayValue); aria-live=polite
stat.attachUnit(el)     // textContent = unit
stat.attachTrend(el)    // textContent = trendFormatter(trend); data-trend-* attrs + data-hidden
```

## Painted attributes

### Root (attachRoot)
- `role="group"`
- `data-trend-direction="up|down|flat"` (when trend present)
- `data-has-trend` (when trend present)

### Trend (attachTrend)
- `data-trend-direction="up|down|flat"`
- `data-trend-value="<num>"`
- `data-hidden` (when no trend)

## Tween behavior

Updating `value` triggers a quadratic ease-out tween of `displayValue`
over `animationDuration` ms. The target value is set immediately;
only the displayed value animates. Multiple `setValue` calls in quick
succession re-target the same tween from the current frame (no jumpy
resets).

Default formatter:
- abs(n) >= 1000:  `Math.round(n).toLocaleString()`  → "1,234"
- abs(n) >= 1:     `n.toFixed(0)`                     → "42"
- otherwise:       `n.toFixed(2)`                     → "0.85"

Override via `formatter` option for "%", "$", custom locales, etc.

## Custom element

```html
<lite-stat
    value="1234"
    label="Revenue"
    unit="$"
    trend-direction="up"
    trend-value="12.5"
    animation-duration="600"
>
    <span     data-stat-label></span>
    <strong   data-stat-value></strong>
    <span     data-stat-unit></span>
    <small    data-stat-trend></small>
</lite-stat>
```

### Host API
```js
host.value / .displayedValue / .trend     // accessors
host.setValue(v) / .setLabel(s) / .setUnit(s) / .setTrend(t)
host._statInstance
```

### Host attributes
- `value="<number>"`
- `label="..."`
- `unit="..."`
- `trend-direction="up|down|flat"` + `trend-value="<num>"`
- `animation-duration="<ms>"`

### Custom element events
- `valuechange` `{ detail: { value, previousValue } }`

## Composition

- **Dashboard grid**: 4-6 stats side by side. Set the value from a
  reactive source (effect that reads a fetched API result).
- **Animated counter on enter**: bind a value-from-0 tween to an
  intersection-observer trigger.
- **Big number display**: `formatter: (n) => n.toLocaleString()` plus
  `unit: "users"` for "12,345 users".
- **Percentage with sign**:
  ```js
  formatter: (n) => Math.round(n * 100) + "%"
  trendFormatter: (t) => (t.direction === "up" ? "+" : "-") + t.value.toFixed(1) + " pp"
  ```

## Notes

- The tween uses `requestAnimationFrame` when available, falling back
  to `setTimeout(16)` so the primitive works in Node test environments
  (happy-dom doesn't ship rAF globally).
- `aria-live="polite"` on the value element means screen readers will
  announce numeric updates. For high-frequency updates (live ticker)
  consider attaching to a separate hidden element or setting a custom
  formatter that includes the label.
- The primitive does NOT manage the trend arrow icon -- that's the
  consumer's job (use CSS `[data-trend-direction="up"] .arrow-up` etc).

## CSS contract

This primitive's painted attributes follow the canonical CSS contract
in `docs/CSS_CONTRACT.md`. See that doc for the cross-primitive
taxonomy (booleans like `data-open` / `data-disabled` / `data-loading`,
enums like `data-status` / `data-side`, ARIA pairings, host accessor
naming, and event naming).
